description_long: This is a freestanding self-service payment kiosk with a tall, rectangular form and a wide, stable base. The front features a large, vertically oriented digital display screen with a blue background, PayPal branding, a QR code, and colorful graphic accents. The kiosk is constructed primarily from dark-colored metal or plastic, with ventilation grilles and a service panel visible on the rear. The sides are slim and flat, emphasizing the kiosk's modern, space-efficient design. The overall appearance is sleek and professional, suitable for high-traffic urban environments such as sidewalks, malls, or transit stations. The kiosk is designed for contactless payment interactions, likely supporting QR code scanning and digital transactions.
description: A tall, freestanding payment kiosk with a large digital display, PayPal branding, and a sturdy dark frame. The design is sleek and modern, ideal for urban public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large digital display with PayPal branding, QR code, and colorful graphics.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile and the depth of the kiosk, with no visible interactive features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying ventilation grilles and a service panel, with no screen or branding visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and flat surface.
attribute_display_screen: A large, vertically oriented rectangular display screen occupies most of the front face, surrounded by a narrow bezel. The screen displays digital content including branding, instructions, and a QR code.
attribute_payment_interface: A QR code is visible on the display for contactless payment; no physical card reader, keypad, or cash slot is visible.
attribute_branding_or_logo: A prominent PayPal logo is digitally displayed at the top of the front screen, in white and blue, as part of the screen content.
attribute_instructional_signage: Instructional text ('The easy way to pay') and a QR code are digitally displayed on the front screen, providing user guidance in a clear, modern style.
